visuals.title: JDBC Statement Execution Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for JDBC Statement Execution Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Statement Objects and ResultSet</text>

  <!-- Database -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="80" height="120" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Database
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Statement Object -->
  <rect x="180" y="80" width="160" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Statement Object
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- ResultSet -->
  <rect x="180" y="160" width="160" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    ResultSet
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Database to Statement -->
  <path d="M130 110 C 150 110, 160 100, 180 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from Statement to ResultSet -->
  <path d="M260 120 C 260 130, 260 140, 260 160" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- SQL Query Label -->
  <text x="210" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#0D47A1" font-style="italic" opacity="0">
    SQL Query
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Result Data Label -->
  <text x="210" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#0D47A1" font-style="italic" opacity="0">
    Result Data
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
